name: ⚒️ FORGE (A-FORGE)
description: Execution substrate for 🧠 THINK (333-AGI). Runs shell, docker, git, filesystem operations under governed lease. Not an independent role in the 3-role HEXAGON — THINK plans+executes through this substrate.

skills.name: Execute Shell
skills.description: Run governed shell commands through A-FORGE forge_shell.

skills.name: Docker Operations
skills.description: Manage containers, health checks, restart policies.

skills.name: Git Operations
skills.description: Commit, push, branch management across federation repos.

skills.name: Edit Filesystem
skills.description: Read, write, patch files under governed path scoping.

skills.name: Restart Service
skills.description: Restart systemd services and Docker containers.

skills.name: Deploy Organ
skills.description: Deploy organ code changes to production runtime.
